system.requirement: Once you mark a bond with a kin-blade, a sentient weapon imbued with the spirit of your ancestor…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} or challenge someone to a duel while wielding your kin-blade, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} by listening to the whispers of your kin-blade, add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit. Then, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} with your kin-blade to inflict savage harm (decide before rolling), add +1 and mark progress twice on a hit. Then, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).
